spec.title: GPS Position
spec.description: This shows the GPS position with color coding based on Speed (in km/h).

spec.rawSQL:
SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as Time,
    AVG(longitude) as AVG_longitude, AVG(latitude) as AVG_latitude, AVG(positionaccuracy) as AVG_positionaccuracy
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_can9_gnsspos
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)	
ORDER BY
    Time ASC

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as Time,
    AVG(speed) as AVG_speed
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_can9_gnssspeed
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)
ORDER BY
    Time ASC

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    avg(S01PID04_CalcEngineLoad) as EngineLoad
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_CAN1_OBD2_S_M41_S01PID_M04
WHERE
    date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd')
    AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    avg(S01PID0C_EngineRPM) as EngineSpeed
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_CAN1_OBD2_S_M41_S01PID_M0C
WHERE
    date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd')
    AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)

spec.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trailer_input WHERE vin = '$Trailer'

SELECT
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval) as time,
    ${signal_value:csv}
FROM
    tbl_${device:csv}_${message:csv}
WHERE
	date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd') 
	AND
    $__timeFilter(t)
GROUP BY
    $__timeGroup(t, $__interval)	
order by 
    time asc

WITH distance_deltas AS (
    SELECT
        distancetrip - LAG(distancetrip) OVER (ORDER BY t) AS delta_distance
    FROM
        tbl_${device:csv}_can9_gnssdistance
    WHERE
        date_created BETWEEN $__rawTimeFrom('yyyy/MM/dd') AND $__rawTimeTo('yyyy/MM/dd')
        AND
        $__timeFilter(t)
)
SELECT
    SUM(IF(delta_distance > 0, delta_distance, 0)) AS sum_positive_delta_distance
FROM
    distance_deltas
WHERE
    delta_distance IS NOT NULL;

spec.rawSql: SELECT imei FROM trailers WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT make, model, active FROM trailers WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT "time" FROM trailer_loads WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY "time" DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT speed FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer'
SELECT odototal FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY odototal DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT odotrip FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY odototal DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT voltagebattery FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY voltagebattery DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT satellitescount FROM trailer_input WHERE vin='$Trailer' ORDER BY satellitescount DESC LIMIT 1
